texto: i see poets riding the red winds unchecked by the borders of time, wandering with light feet over the land mines and trip wires, barbed and barbarian, unfettered through the barriers that curtail the flows of life, poets pelting the halting barriers which strangle everyone everywhere.
explicacao: Citação de Peter Standish Evans sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “i see poets riding the red winds unchecked by the borders of time, wandering with light feet over…” articula reflexao, poetry-quotes, poets em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
